arts.ttl: Rangers man on verge of Ibrox exit – Deal and personal terms agreed, on site to finalise move
arts.sum: Rabbi Matondo is on the verge of leaving Rangers to join Hannover 96 on loan until the end of the season. That’s according to journalist Florian Plettenberg, who reports the winger is already on site with the German side ready to complete the move from Ibrox. arts.ttl: Officials ‘particularly fond’ of Rangers player – On director’s list for late winter move
arts.sum: Rangers manager Philippe Clement may be without Rabbi Matondo beyond the winter market. Ajax have identified the winger as one of the candidates to strengthen their attack in this window. That’s according to De Telegraaf, who explain Ajax technical director Alex Kroes has the Rangers man and two other players in his list.
